metadata.title: Plyknot Conceptual Dependency Graph
metadata.description: Directed graph: edge from X to Y means 'X depends on Y being solid for X to be solid'. Status uses the framework's own convergence vocabulary plus 'proposed' and 'superseded'.

status_legend.converged: ● Implemented and empirically validated; can be relied on
status_legend.tension: ◐ Implemented but validation is partial, or one prediction has not held
status_legend.divergent: ○ Empirically contradicted in at least one place; original hypothesis needs revision
status_legend.single: ◌ Implemented in code or one paper only; not yet replicated or independently validated
status_legend.proposed: ◇ Designed or named but not yet implemented
status_legend.superseded: ✕ Replaced by a newer concept; kept as design archaeology

kind_legend.axiom: Foundational architectural commitment that other concepts presuppose
kind_legend.principle: Named architectural principle that organizes multiple primitives
kind_legend.domain-finding: Empirical result from a specific domain validation

nodes.label: Coupling Map
nodes.summary: Sparse associative store keyed by (measurer, target, property). Every measurement record is a numerical entry in this map. Iteration over absent entries is structurally skipped.

nodes.label: Depends Discipline
nodes.summary: `depends` arrays on inference steps must reference operational mechanisms only — physical or computational machinery. Theories and target assumptions are inadmissible. Validator raises TheoreticalPartitionError on violation.

nodes.label: Core ↛ Registry Firewall
nodes.summary: Core (coupling map, depends graph) reads can flow into the registry; registry never enters core computation. Labels do not flow into computation.

nodes.label: measure() vs predict() Source Tag
nodes.summary: Every coupling entry carries a source tag: measurement (physical interaction) or prediction (claim from a pipeline). Convergence treats them equally; epistemic distinction is preserved structurally.

nodes.label: Anchor is Measurement, not Physics
nodes.summary: Three-question rule: produces a number → coupling map; instrument embodies it → depends; only said in words → registry. Levels are labels in the registry; the core is level-agnostic.

nodes.label: Structural Absence
nodes.summary: Absent ≠ zero. A property that doesn't apply has no Map entry. Photon has no mass entry; gravity system iterates over the mass Map and the photon is invisible to it. No conditional check needed.

nodes.label: Convergence Status (●/◐/○/◌)
nodes.summary: Each coupling group classified as converged / tension / divergent / single based on relative spread. Computed function of group contents, not a primitive resolved value.

nodes.label: Five Inference Levels
nodes.summary: Signal → Measurement → Pattern → Model → Hypothesis. Marker passing drops different markers based on level + convergence status.

nodes.label: Six Complexity Levels (0-5)
nodes.summary: Fundamental → nuclear → molecular → cellular → organismal → social. Orthogonal to inference levels. Earned through convergence, not declared.

nodes.label: Pattern Map Promotion Rule
nodes.summary: A property earns Pattern Map status only when at least one measurement (not just predictions) is among the converging couplings. Theoretical consensus alone never promotes.

nodes.label: Ontological Load
nodes.summary: The degree to which the brain constructs the measured object. Operationalized via perturbation σ. Sensory σ ≈ 0.03; cognitive σ ≈ 0.18 in clinical text. Replication-rate correlation ρ = 0.619 (psych), 0.90 (mol bio).

nodes.label: Mechanics as Instrument
nodes.summary: An instrument is anything that produces a number AND has a recordable depends chain naming operational mechanisms. Substrate-agnostic. Catalog: physical, computational, text/LLM, image, embedding, survey, patent, framework analysers.

nodes.label: Triangulation (depends-overlap test)
nodes.summary: Substrate-independence test via depends-chain overlap. Three uses: graduation rule (canvas §7.1), blind-spot finder (find_blind_spots), multi-beam comparison (Strategic Shear / patent-FTO).

nodes.label: Phenomenological Mass
nodes.summary: tier × convergence_score × log(1 + independent_measurers). Mass concept itself usable (Test 2, 316 pairs, range 0.000-7.784); Lensing-detector formulation null at Test 4 ceiling effect.

nodes.label: Marker Passing
nodes.summary: BFS marker propagation on depends graph with per-hop decay. First-class markers on converged steps, second-class on cracked. Collisions classified opening/crack/bridge by marker type. Phase 1.5 Test 3 confirmed cyclic-graph termination.

nodes.label: Measurer Correlation
nodes.summary: Per-measurer scan across coupling groups. Classifies measurer as systemic-crack (◆), systemic-opening (◈), or local. Validated across 7 domains.

nodes.label: Echo Chamber Classification
nodes.summary: Flags entity-property pairs where multiple predictions agree but at least one measurement diverges. Validated: materials 70.5% refutation rate (571 compounds), AlphaFold 754 echo chambers, MCL-1 12× divergence.

nodes.label: Population Decomposition (GMM+BIC)
nodes.summary: GMM with BIC threshold detects when one entity ID conflates multiple physical referents. 8/8 method-purity controls; 100% accuracy on labeled cases. Three guards: minimum component size, ΔBIC ≥ 10, minimum separation.

nodes.label: Blind-Spot Triangulation
nodes.summary: Identifies entity pairs sharing depends but with no coupling between them. Ranks by shared-dependency count. Implemented but priority formula not yet calibrated against held-out data.

nodes.label: Prediction Provenance Trace
nodes.summary: Recursive walk through inputs DAG of predict() entries. Reports upstream cracks. Used for transducer-degradation diagnostics.

nodes.label: Structural Holes
nodes.summary: Missing inference-level entries within an otherwise solid chain. Used in patent-FTO continuation analysis. Validated structurally in Stage 3 but not yet on a non-patent target.

nodes.label: CFG-Denoising Mechanism
nodes.summary: Two extraction passes (unconditioned, conditioned on coupling-map anchors) blended at scale ξ. U-shaped error curve confirms mechanism (optimum ξ=0.50). Iterative resolution descent (document → paragraph → sentence) with re-run variance stopping rule.

nodes.label: Ontological Denoising
nodes.summary: Text-as-noisy-image, LLM-as-denoiser. CFG-denoising is the mechanism; the principle names what the mechanism does. Real-paired-data validation (BioVid, MIMIC) pending. Cross-provider convergence pending.

nodes.label: Common Ground Conditioning
nodes.summary: Accumulated structured prior context across documents. Order-independent at 100-paper scale (4 randomized orderings, identical final coupling map). Structural-only CG produces ρ=0.672 with replication.

nodes.label: Predicate Decomposition (sensory/cognitive)
nodes.summary: Decomposes text into predicate units, classifies as sensory or cognitive. 4/5 predicate types achieve κ=1.0 across 10 runs. Routes claims to measure() vs predict() at extraction time.

nodes.label: Symbol Grounding (embedding-based)
nodes.summary: Sentence-transformer embedding maps natural language to integer entity IDs. 92.7% accuracy on 56-entity pharma registry; 100% on methodology terminology. Index IS the instrument — construction parameters in depends.

nodes.label: Describe Pipeline
nodes.summary: End-to-end pipeline: predicate decomposition → grounding → CFG-anchored extraction → distribution shape → coupling-map entries. The integration path.

nodes.label: Lens (verb)
nodes.summary: Read target through frame; the strain (CFG blend delta) is the measurement. Existing primitives (check_shear, extract_with_grounding, analyze_measurer_correlation, patent-FTO) are special cases.

nodes.label: Open Values
nodes.summary: Computation operates on derived signals (status, mass, strain, σ, marker activation, provenance) without resolving ground-truth values. Operational dual to holographic coupling. Five mechanisms; just synthesized.

nodes.label: Holographic Coupling
nodes.summary: Entity IS its convergence pattern across substrate-independent measurers. Five constituent primitives (mass, triangulation, Event Horizon, Fission, Lensing). Stage 3 empirical validation 2026-04-26.

nodes.label: Canvas Architecture
nodes.summary: Three projections (Phenomenological, Operational, Epistemic) of the coupling-map tensor. Tests 2/3/5 + Experiment B positive; Test 4 (Lensing detector) null with known cause; Test 4b pending.

nodes.label: Shear
nodes.summary: Vector difference between an entity's motion on two canvases. Used in patent-FTO Strategic Shear and in transducer-degradation diagnostics. Validated structurally in Stage 3.

nodes.label: Lensing Strain
nodes.summary: |epistemic_delta| / phenomenological_mass. Test 4 returned null (ceiling effect). Test 4b (predicate-intensity domain redesign) pending. Mass discrimination claim pending.

nodes.label: Epistemic Event Horizon
nodes.summary: Level-5 entities trapped inside Epistemic canvas until physical instruments arrive. Test 5 (2026-04-21): discrete tier jump 0→3 at SAM arrival on emotional arousal. Strong validation.

nodes.label: Phenomenological Fission
nodes.summary: Graduated entities with disagreeing measurers render as multi-lobed geometry. Experiment B on TMPRSS2: ΔBIC = 39.9, 100% lobe purity.

nodes.label: Phenomenological Fusion
nodes.summary: Two entities from different fields converging on all shared properties suggest the same phenomenon under different labels. Mentioned in flagship; not yet empirically demonstrated end-to-end.

nodes.label: Imputed Dark Matter
nodes.summary: Empty-depends instruments anchor to domain-default substrate node. Within-vendor anchoring validated; cross-vendor pattern attributed specifically to alignment-method overlap.

nodes.label: Emergence as Dual of Structural Absence
nodes.summary: New Map entries appear on composite entities that no constituent possesses. Computed via measurement-vs-prediction divergence. Sat 5 thermodynamic-bounds treatment in progress.

nodes.label: Thermodynamic Irreducibility (Landauer/Bekenstein)
nodes.summary: Connecting emergence forms to Landauer, Bekenstein, Margolus-Levitin bounds as principled floor on reducibility. Worked-case selection unresolved; satellite deferred until Q2 2027.

nodes.label: act() verb (reflexivity / performativity)
nodes.summary: Fourth verb alongside measure/predict/describe. Reflexive provenance with σ propagation. Designed; not yet implemented. Phase 2 trigger conjunctive on flagship arXiv + patent priority + bandwidth.

nodes.label: LLM as Measurable Instrument (Layer 3)
nodes.summary: Instrument-as-target dual representation: LLM produces measurements AND has architectural attributes recorded as coupling entries on itself. Symmetric difference predicts divergence. Validated for AF×ESMFold; LLM extension pending.

nodes.label: AlphaFold × ESMFold Attribute-Set Arithmetic
nodes.summary: Symmetric difference of architectural attribute sets predicts divergence locations. 100% recall on 57 biological echo chambers across 1,069 proteins. Hardcoded baseline misses 26%.

nodes.label: CXR Echo Chambers (Sat 1)
nodes.summary: Cross-comparison of multiple CXR AI models against radiologist panels. Identifies cases of unanimous model agreement against radiologist majority. Evaluator planned, not yet started.

nodes.label: Materials + Pharma Echo Chambers (Sat 3)
nodes.summary: DFT 70.5% refutation rate against calorimetry on 571 compounds (shared GGA-PBE functional). MCL-1 A-1210477 12× FEP+/docking divergence from experimental majority (calibration against SPR artifact).

nodes.label: TMPRSS2 Autonomous Discovery (Sat 2)
nodes.summary: Autonomous extraction of 504 measurements from 100 PMC papers surfaced 20× enzyme-vs-cellular crack on N-0920 without human guidance. Single-point but non-circular result.

nodes.label: ΛCDM Systemic Crack
nodes.summary: Marker passer recovers ΛCDM as systemic-crack node connecting Hubble tension (5.8σ), S8 tension, and matter dipole. Recovery is blind to the concept name (cosmological principle excluded from operational vocabulary).

nodes.label: Neutron Lifetime 4.5σ Crack
nodes.summary: Bottle vs beam methods diverge by 9.95s (4.5σ). Persistent local crack across 40 years; speciation candidate (the integer ID may represent two physical entities current methods conflate).

nodes.label: Patent-FTO Stage 3 Multi-Beam Run
nodes.summary: 35 claims × 49 references × 37 code modules through holographic coupling composition. 136 Haiku calls, ~3 hours, zero API spend. Composes correctly but verification work in §5 still open.

nodes.label: Foundation Asimov Test 1 (Shear)
nodes.summary: Validates Ontological Shear mechanism. 1,068/1,069 protein conformance; speciation firing on 26 entities.

nodes.label: Foundation Asimov Test 2 (DCOI / McLean-Pontiff)
nodes.summary: Wrong-sign signal: substrate-overlap with prior literature predicts predictor robustness, not fragility (rho = -0.29, p = 0.010). Original commercial-thesis framing empirically contradicted on 97 stock-return predictors. Survives confound controls.

nodes.label: Patent Claim 1 — System
nodes.summary: Coupling map + provenance records + convergence-status controller + calibration output controller. Distinguishes physical-sensor-grounded convergence from shared-substrate echo.

nodes.label: Patent Claim 9-10 — Marker Propagation
nodes.summary: Marker-propagation analyser with class-distinguished collisions (opening/crack/bridge). Decay-bounded BFS with sub-quadratic complexity guarantee.

nodes.label: Patent Claim 7 — Population Decomposition
nodes.summary: GMM+BIC entity-splitting subroutine with three guards. Distinguishes apparent divergence from identifier-overloading.

nodes.label: Patent Claim 6 — Echo Chamber
nodes.summary: Echo-chamber detection subroutine flagging prediction-only consensus that diverges from at least one physical measurement.

nodes.label: Patent Framing B — Source-Tagged Instrument
nodes.summary: LLM extraction as first-class source-tagged instrument feeding the same reconciliation pipeline as physical sensors. Three distinguishing features: schema equivalence, closed-loop self-conditioning, same-analyser-classifies-extractor. To be filed as separate provisional.

nodes.label: Patent Framing A — CFG-Denoising Mechanism
nodes.summary: Cornered by Sanchez 2023 + Smirnov 2024 + DiffusionNER. Recommendation: drop from independent claims; defensive publication via arXiv Sat 2.

nodes.label: Submission Architecture
nodes.summary: 10 modules (scope, disambiguation, comparable_count, calibration, classifier, concentration, fusion, entity_history, submission, agent_policy). 201 tests. Trust = computed from behavior. Bridge-first agent policy.

nodes.label: Trust-Weight Loop
nodes.summary: Echo-chamber outcomes feed back into measurer-correlation classification on subsequent invocations. Closes the analyser-as-instrument loop.

nodes.label: Operational-Mechanism Vocabulary Partition
nodes.summary: Schema-level partition between admissible (operational mechanisms) and inadmissible (theoretical commitments). Validator enforces at registration time. ΛCDM-recovered-blind result depends on this.

nodes.label: Act-Verb Phase 1.5 Tests
nodes.summary: σ-propagation correctness audit, source-field coverage tests, cyclic marker-passer behavior. Test 3 (cyclic graphs) passed cleanly.

nodes.label: AlphaFold Cancel Edge
nodes.summary: Symbolic instrument lineage with cancel-edge semantics. Superseded by Layer 3 attribute-set arithmetic over coupling-map entries.

nodes.label: ML-Plyknot Prototype
nodes.summary: Typed-hypergraph ML architecture with operationalist inductive bias. Tests whether moving-truth tasks (McLean-Pontiff decay prediction from pre-publication data) benefit from the bias. Idea status; gated on prior-art derisking and CRSP/Compustat access.

nodes.label: U-Shaped Error Curve (CFG sweep)
nodes.summary: Guidance sweep across ξ ∈ {0, 0.25, 0.50, 0.75, 1.0}: U shape with optimum at ξ = 0.50. Methodological sanity check that the CFG mechanism is real, not a single-sided shortcut.

nodes.label: Perturbation σ ↔ Replication Rates
nodes.summary: Within-domain σ correlates with replication: ρ=0.619 (psych single-sentence), ρ=0.90 (mol bio three-sentence). Cross-domain null. Sample size small; needs scale-up.

nodes.label: Order-Independent Common Ground at 100-paper scale
nodes.summary: Four randomized orderings of 100 PMC papers produced identical final coupling-map states. Per-paper extractions differ; final state invariant.

edges.rationale: Convergence is computed over coupling-group contents
Convergence treats both source tags equally but presupposes the distinction
Inference steps validated against operational-mechanism partition
Complexity earned through convergence, not declared
Orthogonal-but-coupled axes; both required to read convergence-strength gradient
Requires at least one measurement; predictions alone never promote
Load also varies along inference levels
Instrumenthood defined by operational-mechanism embodiment in depends
The anchoring principle is the axiom; mechanics-as-instrument is its catalog form
Instrument categories live in registry; do not enter core
Without instrument principle, depends has nothing to test overlap on
Mass formula uses substrate-independent measurer count
Marker class assigned by convergence status of step
Inference step is the marker carrier
Detects prediction-only consensus diverging from measurements
Application of substrate-independence test for discovery
Reads depends chains for shared mechanisms
Reports upstream cracks via correlation pattern
Composes with marker collisions on chains
Anchors retrieved by entity ID from coupling map
LLM as instrument; CFG blend is the operation
CFG-denoising is the mechanism; ontological denoising names what it does
Text extraction operates under the anchoring principle
Lens generalizes the dual-pass mechanism to any frame; ontological denoising is the numerical-anchor case
CG accumulates coupling-map state for conditioning
CG IS the conditioning anchor in CFG denoising
Routes to measure() vs predict() per predicate
Maps NL queries to entity IDs
Embedding model is a calibratable instrument
Lens uses the CFG blend mechanism
Operational dual of holographic-coupling's ontological claim
Marker passing on status — one of five mechanisms
Strain ratio — one of five mechanisms
Provenance chain — one of five mechanisms
Limit case — value doesn't exist, computation skips
Convergence pattern only meaningful given substrate-independence test
Mass IS the readout of the convergence pattern
Constituent primitive: Level-5 entities trapped in Epistemic
Constituent primitive: graduated entities with disagreement render as multi-lobed
Constituent primitive: high mass anchors interpretation
Three projections of the coupling-map tensor
Defined as motion delta between two canvases
Shear most useful between code-as-measure and patent-as-predict
Multi-modal coupling group is fission geometry
Each lobe carries its own mass
Convergence on all shared properties suggests fusion
Cross-domain entity matching uses similar primitive
Emergence is the dual of structural absence
Computed via measurement-prediction divergence at composite level
New entries appear as composite entities form at higher levels
Bounds the floor on emergence reducibility
Action entries live in same map
Specialization of the instrument principle for LLMs
Predicted divergence locations are echo-chamber candidates
Refutation rate gates on at least one measurement
ΛCDM recovered as systemic-crack via marker collisions
Patent-FTO is a lens use case
Cross-beam marker collisions identify FTO threats
Strategic Shear used for IP-pipeline mapping
Source-tag equivalence between physical and computational instruments
Source-tag equivalence is the principle stated as system claim
Operates on existing Universe + GraphEvent state
Theoretical labels stay outside the active vocabulary
Operationalist inductive bias = encoded measure/predict/act discipline
Test target is McLean-Pontiff decay prediction
